channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Australian citizen detained by ICE at US airport sparks consular assistance inquiry
item.description: An Australian citizen, Phu Nyuyen, was tackled and handcuffed by US Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) agents at Las Vegas airport, sparking public outrage and calls for accountability. Video f...

item.title: Samantha Morton discusses her role in 'The Odyssey' and career resurgence
item.description: Samantha Morton, renowned actress and Oscar nominee, has described her role in Christopher Nolan’s epic adaptation of Homer’s 'The Odyssey' as a career-defining opportunity. The film, which premiered ...

item.title: Two brothers from Winnipeg believed to have drowned in Manitoba's Nutimik Lake
item.description: Two brothers from Winnipeg, aged 10 and 13, are believed to have drowned in Manitoba's Nutimik Lake after slipping into fast-moving rapids near Sturgeon Falls Trail on Saturday. RCMP confirmed a searc...

item.title: The 1957 Dual-Ghia Convertible: A Symbol of 1950s Automotive Excellence and Hollywood Glamour
item.description: The 1957 Dual-Ghia Convertible stands as one of the most exclusive and iconic automobiles of the 1950s, representing a unique collaboration between American manufacturer Dual Motors and Italian coachb...

item.title: Wildfire forces 700 evacuations, burns 13,000 hectares in Spain as climate concerns grow
item.description: A wildfire near Madrid has forced the evacuation of approximately 700 residents, burning around 13,000 hectares of land. The blaze, which broke out on Thursday, is being tackled by 300 firefighters su...

item.title: Lionel Messi Concludes World Cup Career with Spain Defeat, Ballon d'Or Tribute Highlights Legacy
item.description: The official Ballon d'Or account paid tribute to Lionel Messi following Argentina's defeat to Spain in the 2026 FIFA World Cup final. The loss marked the end of Messi's historic World Cup career, wher...

item.title: Trump Administration Escalates Election Security Rhetoric with Threats of Penalties
item.description: Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin's comments during a press conference about election security have raised alarm among analysts. Mullin directed states to 'scrub their voter rolls' to compl...

item.title: Senate Invites Alan and Lino Cayetano to Investigate Alleged Flood Control Projects in Taguig
item.description: Senator Alan Peter Cayetano and his younger brother, PTV-4 General Manager Lino Cayetano, will be invited to the Senate Blue Ribbon Committee's flood control hearings. The probe is linked to alleged '...

item.title: U.S. Diplomats Address Consular Cases in International Affairs
item.description: The article discusses the role of U.S. diplomats in managing consular cases abroad, emphasizing their responsibilities in providing assistance to American citizens in foreign countries. It highlights ...

item.title: Sonam Wangchuk's Hunger Strike Ends If Political Leaders Address Education and Accountability in Monsoon Session

item.title: South African Platform Helps Consumers Save on Groceries by Comparing Prices Across Retailers
item.description: Shaun Nare, a 27-year-old commercial analyst from Midrand, created Wallet Hero, a free grocery price comparison website, inspired by his grandmother's habit of comparing supermarket pamphlets to stret...

item.title: Thames Water Lenders Prepare Legal Challenge Amid Nationalisation Concerns
item.description: The lenders of Thames Water, Britain's largest water company, are preparing a legal challenge in the event of a nationalisation attempt by a Burnham-led government. Burnham, who will become Prime Mini...

item.title: PS Plus Extra and Premium Games for July 2026 Announced

item.title: Spain Wins 2026 World Cup But Can't Keep Original Trophy
item.description: Spain clinched the 2026 FIFA World Cup title by defeating Argentina 1-0 in the final, with Ferran Torres scoring the decisive goal. Argentina's Enzo Fernandez was sent off during the match, leaving th...

item.title: Ancient Greek Food Economy Showed Mixed Farming Methods, Study Finds
item.description: A study analyzing isotopic data from animal remains at the Azoria site in Crete reveals that ancient Greek food systems combined both nomadic herding and integrated farming. Researchers previously deb...

item.title: Rising red meat prices and production challenges in South Africa
item.description: The article highlights the significant increase in red meat prices compared to chicken in South Africa, with beef mince rising by R12.10 per kilogram and boerewors by R14.56. Consumers are shifting to...

item.title: Mantrac and NMB collaborate to boost equipment financing for mining and construction sectors
item.description: Mantrac and NMB have partnered to provide equipment financing solutions for miners and contractors, aiming to enhance productivity and economic growth in Tanzania. This initiative aligns with broader ...

item.title: Caloocan Vlogger Killed in Attack; Police Launch Investigation
item.description: A police investigation has been launched following the killing of Alicia Lipata, a political vlogger in Caloocan City. The incident occurred after Lipata, who supported former President Ferdinand Marc...

item.title: Two Youths Missing After River Accident in Kaduna
item.description: Two youths went missing after being swept away by a swollen river in Hayin Malam Bello community, Kaduna State, following heavy rains. The incident occurred as they tried to cross the river on their w...

item.title: Political blame game: NSW parties tie opponents to federal controversies
item.description: The article examines the declining primary votes for both major political parties in New South Wales (NSW), highlighting how they are increasingly linking their opponents to federal issues to shift re...
